name: Milvus Lite
description: Milvus Lite is the lightweight embedded version of Milvus, the high-performance vector database. Packaged inside pymilvus and installable via pip, it runs entirely in-process with no external dependencies. Connection is as simple as passing a local .db path to MilvusClient. It provides the full pymilvus API surface — collection CRUD, vector insertion, ANN search with scalar filtering, and metadata queries — so code written for Milvus Lite migrates seamlessly to Milvus Standalone, Milvus Distributed, or Zilliz Cloud.
format_on_disk: LSM-style with WAL, immutable Parquet segments, and segment-level FAISS indexes (multi-file per data_dir)
core_strengths: Zero-configuration embedded mode via a local .db path
Full pymilvus API compatibility for seamless migration to production Milvus
Segment-level FAISS indexes for fast approximate nearest neighbor search
Scalar filtering combined with vector search in a single query
BM25 full-text search alongside dense and sparse vector search
Optional gRPC server mode for multi-client local development
best_use_cases: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) prototyping and local development
Jupyter notebook-based AI experimentation with vector search
Unit and integration testing for pymilvus-based applications
Small-scale semantic search in local CLI and desktop tools
Learning the Milvus API without deploying infrastructure
remarks: Milvus Lite is included in pymilvus — install with `pip install pymilvus` (no separate milvus-lite package needed unless using the CLI server). A single data_dir can only be used by one process at a time (file-locked). This is a local development engine; for production workloads use Milvus Standalone, Milvus Distributed, or Zilliz Cloud. No authentication, RBAC, or multi-tenancy support.
